summary: Comprehensive testing of Byaj (Interest) with Monthly Rate and Chit Fund features completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all features work correctly including formula display, calculation modals, and Cash Book integration.
passed_tests: Byaj - Interest account creation with monthly rate
Byaj - 30 days = 1 month calculation (Formula: P × R × 1 / 100)
Byaj - 45 days = 1.5 months calculation (Formula: P × R × 1.5 / 100)
Byaj - 60 days = 2 months calculation (Formula: P × R × 2 / 100)
Byaj - Large principal calculation (1 Crore at 12%/month)
Byaj - Add interest to Cash Book with correct description
Chit Fund - Create new chit fund with all fields
Chit Fund - Get all chit funds
Chit Fund - Get chit fund by ID
Chit Fund - Update chit fund details
Chit Fund - Pay installment auto-adds DEBIT to Cash Book
Chit Fund - Duplicate month payment blocked
Chit Fund - View payment history
Chit Fund - Mark chit as Won auto-adds CREDIT to Cash Book
Chit Fund - Duplicate win blocked
Chit Fund - Summary shows correct totals
Cash Book - Shows chit_fund category in transactions
Expenses - chit_fund is valid expense category
All 10 navigation tabs working (Dashboard, Staff, Attendance, Salary, Cash Book, Party Ledger, Byaj, Expenses, Reports, Chit Fund)
UI - Byaj formula info box shows monthly rate and 30-day basis
UI - Interest calculation modal shows months and 30-day explanation
UI - Chit Fund Pay modal shows Cash Book Debit info
UI - Chit Fund Won modal shows Cash Book Credit info
UI - Payment History modal shows all payments
critical_code_review_comments: Byaj formula correctly changed from daily (365 days) to monthly (30 days) basis
Formula: (Principal × Monthly Rate × Months) / 100 where Months = Days / 30
Chit Fund CRUD operations working correctly
Chit Fund payments auto-link to Cash Book as DEBIT entries
Chit Fund wins auto-link to Cash Book as CREDIT entries
chit_fund category added to ExpenseCategory enum
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_Byaj_Party, various TEST_ prefixed chit funds. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Byaj and Chit Fund features fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_byaj_chitfund.py cover: Monthly interest calculation (30-day basis), Chit Fund CRUD, Payment with Cash Book auto-link, Win with Cash Book auto-link, Summary calculations. Previous accounting tests in /app/backend/tests/test_accounting_system.py still valid.

byaj_interest.ui_formula_display: Shows formula and 30-day explanation in Hindi
